hook: Reciprocity is not identical behavior; it is comparable investment relative to context.
body: People can show interest differently, but healthy connections still have a rough balance of curiosity, effort, and follow-through.

hook: Men sometimes excuse one-sided dynamics forever because they are comparing style instead of contribution.
body: You do not need mirror-image effort to see whether the connection is alive on both sides.

body: She may not text like you do, but she still makes plans, asks questions, and shows up with energy. That counts.

body: Judge reciprocity by the total pattern of contribution rather than one preferred behavior alone.
